segments.text: Apple, Lacost, Amul, three massive brands and their three hilarious copies.
All of these fought legally and the outcomes were very interesting. So,
first Apple sued Prepare in 2020. They thought the logo looks similar, so Apple wanted it dead. The case went so long
and finally Prepare has to settle. But they also have to change one small detail, the leaf shape. Apple finally showed mercy and Prepare survived. But
this was small copying. So, we have a crocodile versus Laoste. Same crocodile,
same logo and they also fought for 20 years both in court. Finally 2024 came and Laoste won and crocodile
international was banned forever. But perhaps the most smartest copy is this Italian brand copying Amu. Same logo they just added three letters to the
name. So finally so Amul suit and court ruled in favor. Amuleti lost everything.
Seems like those three letters were not enough to hide the steel.
